Lyrics.text:
Onja vaventy, onja mahery
Mila hanafotra ahy izao;
Kanefa aho tsy mba irery,
Fa eo anilako Ianao

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
(Antananao)
Antananao, an-tananao
Tsy mampanahy
(Ny familian-tsamboko )
Ny familian-tsamboko re
(Na tahotra na ahiahy)
Na tahotra eny koa na ahiahy,
(Jesosy ô, eo Aminao)
Jesosy ô, apetrako eo Aminao

Ny rivo-doza 'zay mampahory
Sy mahaketraka ny fo
Tsy hampimalo ahy akory
Fa eo anilako Ianao.

Na isan'andro no mamely
Ny ranonoram-baratra
Hatoky aho, na dia kely,
Fa eo anilako, Ianao.

Misosa hatrany tsimoramora
Ny sambokeliko izao
He! Manakaiky isan'ora
'Lay fitodian-tsoa ar y
